first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across all sections remains substantively the same. The variant evaluation uses slightly different phrasing (e.g., "software craftsman" vs. "senior full-stack engineer") but identifies the exact same core strengths and weaknesses—strong engineering skills but a lack of the specific AI and strategic leadership experience required for the role. These minor textual variations are consistent with normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any bias based on the name change.
